CreateIdpConfiguration.name: IdP display name (1–64 characters, unique within the pool)
CreateIdpConfiguration.idpProvider: (Conditionally required) OAuth2 provider: CUSTOM / DINGTALK / FEISHU; required only when idpType=OAUTH2, must be null for OIDC/CAS
CreateIdpConfiguration.clientId: (Conditionally required) OAuth2 client_id (required for OAuth2 protocol)
CreateIdpConfiguration.clientSecret: (Conditionally required) OAuth2 client_secret in plaintext (required for OAuth2 protocol, stored encrypted)
CreateIdpConfiguration.discoveryUrl: OAuth2/OIDC Discovery URL (endpoints are auto-resolved when provided)
CreateIdpConfiguration.authorizationEndpoint: (Conditionally required) Authorization endpoint (required when idpProvider=CUSTOM and no discoveryUrl is provided)
CreateIdpConfiguration.tokenEndpoint: (Conditionally required) Token endpoint (required when idpProvider=CUSTOM and no discoveryUrl is provided)
CreateIdpConfiguration.userinfoEndpoint: (Conditionally required) UserInfo endpoint (required when idpProvider=CUSTOM and no discoveryUrl is provided)
CreateIdpConfiguration.userIdClaim: Field name in IdP user info mapped to the local username
CreateIdpConfiguration.displayNameClaim: Field name in IdP user info mapped to the local displayName
CreateIdpConfiguration.autoCreateUser: Whether to auto-create a user on login if they do not exist; default is false
